chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-489 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No. 567/ 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 16.03.2026 Mr. Mohan Lal K. Rathore advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, A.A.G. = Heard learned counsel for the applicant and learned A.A.G so also perused the record. For the reasons to follow instant Civil Revision Application is dismissed; consequently the impugned Judgment dated 27-11-2024 passed in Civil Appeal No. 43/ 2024 by the learned Additional District Judge-II/MCAC, Umerkot, is hereby upheld and learned trial Court is directed to expeditiously conclude the trial after framing issues including issues regarding maintainability, limitation and cause of action, preferably within a period of 60 days. Learned trial Court is further directed that no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to the either parties and shall decide the case based on the evidence of the parties and after conclusion of trial, file compliance report with the Additional Registrar of this Court. The instant Civil Revision Application alongwith pending listed application is hereby disposed of in above terms. JUDGE “Saleem” 2
